name: noname-custom-platform
description: Server-authoritative web platform for friend-room identity games and declarative custom content.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sgs/protocol -w @sgs/content-schema -w @sgs/headless-engine -w @sgs/noname-adapter -w @sgs/script-sdk && npm run build -w @sgs/game-server -w @sgs/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @sgs/protocol -w @sgs/content-schema -w @sgs/headless-engine -w @sgs/noname-adapter -w @sgs/script-sdk && npm run typecheck -w @sgs/game-server -w @sgs/web
